sessions.summary: Analyze AudienceService pipeline failure and update Jira ticket CXCDP-35182 with staging status
accomplishments: Analyzed AudienceService build 2.20.2.1926 pipeline log — identified BlackDuck scan failure (group 'customer_data_solutions' does not exist)
Drafted message for CI/CD team support channel about the BlackDuck issue
Added comment to CXCDP-35182 via Playwright MCP: staging deployed v2.20.2.1925 + BlackDuck scan note
Logged 16h work on CXCDP-35182 (analysis, implementation, E2E tests, staging verification)
Documented Playwright MCP lesson: verify connection before dispatching, ask user to /mcp reconnect if needed
nextSteps: Wait for CI/CD team to fix BlackDuck group 'customer_data_solutions'
Staging dry run verification for CXCDP-35182 fix

sessions.summary: Fix Kanban drag-drop to work on full column area and add localStorage persistence
accomplishments: Added localStorage persistence to DataStore — browser task edits survive refresh without GitHub token (commit 7cdbab5)
Rewrote drag-drop to use bounding-box hit testing via _colAtPoint() instead of e.target.closest() which was unreliable (commit 2f55b8c)
Fixed column heights with align-items:stretch on .kanban-board so empty columns match tallest column (commit 7bfebb0)
Reverted broken pointer-events:none approach that prevented dragend from firing
Replaced previous session's stale 'Session activity' hook entry with proper scrum-daily log
nextSteps: Completed - drag-drop and persistence both working
